_comment: HONEST SEED. Internal known-bad scanning infrastructure. Source is our own blocklist, so NO external actor/campaign is claimed — only the facts we have.

EXAMPLE ONLY — documents the actor/campaign/malware relationship format used when you connect MISP/OpenCTI or curate real intel. The indicator is a TEST-NET-2 address (RFC 5737), never real traffic, so it cannot mis-attribute production data.
